nasb.text: So he prepared a great feast for them; and when they had eaten and drunk he sent them away, and they went to their master. And the marauding bands of Arameans did not come again into the land of Israel.

esv.text: So he prepared for them a great feast, and when they had eaten and drunk, he sent them away, and they went to their master. And the Syrians did not come again on raids into the land of Israel.

cnv.text: 於是王為他們預備盛大的宴會；他們吃喝完了，王打發他們離去，他們就回到他們的主人那裡去了。從此，亞蘭的軍隊不再侵犯以色列地了。

ccb.text: 于是，以色列王为他们大摆宴席，等他们吃喝完毕，便放他们回自己主人那里。之后，亚兰人不再侵犯以色列。
